action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Sanitized equipment or utensil, including in-use food dispensing utensil, improperly used or stored.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Contract with a pest management professional not in place. Record of extermination activities not kept on premises.
Tobacco or electronic cigarette use, eating, or drinking from open container in food preparation, food storage or dishwashing area.

Non-food contact surface or equipment made of unacceptable material, not kept clean, or not properly sealed, raised, spaced or movable to allow accessibility for cleaning on all sides, above and underneath the unit.

action: Violations were cited in the following area(s).

violations.description: Hot TCS food item not held at or above 140 °F.

Single service article not provided. Single service article reused or not protected from contamination when transported, stored, dispensed. Drinking straws not completely enclosed in wrapper or dispensed from a sanitary device.
Swollen, leaking, rusted or otherwise damaged canned food to be returned to distributor not segregated from intact product and clearly labeled DO NOT USE
TCS food removed from cold holding or prepared from or combined with ingredients at room temperature not cooled by an approved method to 41 °F or below within 4 hours.
Wiping cloths not stored clean and dry, or in a sanitizing solution, between uses.

violations.description: Hot TCS food item not held at or above 140 °F.

Food, supplies, or equipment not protected from potential source of contamination during storage, preparation, transportation, display, service or from customer’s refillable, reusable container. Condiments not in single-service containers or dispensed directly by the vendor.
